caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt featuring an eagle graphic and a beaded necklace. A green and yellow fabric sash is draped across his chest. The setting appears to be indoors, with a background of light-brown horizontal blinds. The word "ORCA" is displayed in white capitalized letters within a small white box on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stationary position behind the podium, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks. His facial expression and posture shift subtly as he talks, while the background and on-screen text remain constant.
